Seeing a lot of comments about how the original was “abysmal” or boring or frustrating bc the Danish protagonist couple didn’t “do anything” while at the Dutch couple’s estate. That’s the entire point of the film!! The original is an exploration of Scandinavian politeness culture — a slippery slope hypothetical of what can happen when Danish folks’ tendency to be reserved and awkward in social situations (a common theme in Danish film generally) leads to a nightmarish situation. The original was not made with American/English-speaking horror audiences’ tastes, cultural norms, or expectations in mind. I recommend reading Nordic Watchlist’s interview with the director of the original for some additional context if that film left you feeling that way!
